explanation: The rule relies on 'selection\_img' which checks if the Image ends with '\DataSvcUtil.exe' or if the OriginalFileName metadata is present. By renaming the binary to 'not\_suspicious.exe', the 'Image' check is bypassed. If the EDR/SIEM does not reliably extract or check 'OriginalFileName' for renamed binaries in real-time, the rule will not trigger.

In some SIEM environments, the 'contains' operator for CommandLine is case-sensitive depending on the underlying engine configuration (e.g., specific Elasticsearch or Grep setups). Using variations in casing or quoting arguments can sometimes evade simple string-match signatures that expect lowercase or unquoted patterns.
